name: Execution via Windows Scripting Host Component Detected
description: Detects the execution of scripts using the Windows Scripting Host (WSH) component, which can indicate malicious script activity.

prompts.prompt: Suspicious script execution detected via Windows Scripting Host (WSH) component. Event Details: **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **Event ID** {EventID}, **Image Path** {Image}, **Image Loaded** {ImageLoaded}, **User** {User}, **Computer** {Computer}. Investigate this activity for potential malicious script execution.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Event ID for Image Load (7).

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The path of the process loading the WSH component.

parameters.name: ImageLoaded
parameters.description: The path of the loaded WSH component DLL (e.g., wshom.ocx, scrrun.dll, vbscript.dll, jscript.dll, dispex.dll).

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was executed.

parameters.name: Computer
parameters.description: The computer on which the event occurred.
